title: 311 CrossOrganisationVisibilityEnvelope
description: Materialized minimum-necessary visibility contract for cross-organisation hub work.

actingScopeTupleRef.description: Scope tuple hash or ref from the acting context used to mint this envelope.

sourceOrganisationRef.description: Organisation that owns the underlying record or continuity duty.

targetOrganisationRef.description: Organisation currently receiving the projection or write permission.

audienceTierRef.description: Audience tier bound to the envelope.

purposeOfUseRef.description: Purpose-of-use ref carried into the envelope.

requiredCoverageRowRefs.description: Visibility matrix rows this envelope must satisfy.

visibleFieldRefs.description: Exact fields allowed to render under this envelope.

placeholderContractRef.description: Placeholder or out-of-scope contract used where richer data is intentionally withheld.

envelopeState.description: Current validity state of the envelope.
